name: Chickpeas and Carrot Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 cups cooked chickpeas (garbanzo beans), rinsed and drained
1/4 cup plain nonfat yogurt, or low-fat
recipeInstructions:
1. In a glass or ceramic bowl, toss all ingredients except the yogurt and cover.
2. Let the salad stand for several hours at room temperature.
3. When ready to serve, divide the salad onto 4 plates and spoon the yogurt on top.
